prompt: Create a gritty cyberpunk streetwear editorial photo of a single person in a dark wet alley at night, inspired by a Supreme x Ghost in the Shell Section 9 concept. The subject is a young adult with bleached blond spiky wet hair, leaning forward under translucent plastic tarps, one hand pushing up the plastic sheet and the other arm hanging down, face obscured by a plain rectangular blur for anonymity. They wear an all-black tactical nylon outfit with a crinkled hooded jacket and cargo pants, glossy rain-soaked texture, layered silver chain necklaces, and cyber-tech accessories. Include exactly two main chest patches: a white patch on the left chest reading "SECTION 9" with small Japanese characters underneath, and a red box-logo patch on the right chest reading Supreme. Add exactly two front-mounted utility bags: one black round chest pouch with white circuit-board line art, and one transparent rectangular access-card pouch hanging at the waist containing a visible card labeled ACCESS CARD with a spider-tank silhouette graphic. The environment should be a dim industrial passageway with hanging cables, reflective puddles, green-blue fluorescent lighting, shallow depth of field, flash-photography harsh highlights, documentary fashion look, high contrast, wet plastic sheeting surrounding the subject, 1:1 square composition, realistic 35mm street photography, cinematic cyberpunk mood.
